title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Thyrocare Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Thyrocare Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Thyrocare Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Vadodara office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Thyrocare Digital Technologies:
Thyrocare Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Thyrocare Digital Technologies!
